name: construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inconsistent proposal formats cause delays in project approvals. We automate the conversion of bids into standardized proposals instead of manual proposal creation using word processors.
problem_solved: Inconsistent proposal formats lead to confusion and delays in project approvals.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent proposal formats lead to confusion and delays in project approvals.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual proposal creation using word processors

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inconsistent proposal formats cause delays in project approvals. We automate the conversion of bids into standardized proposals instead of manual proposal creation using word processors.
